Name: sapdme_order_v2
Title: Order
ShortText: Perform order related activities, such as getting order details and releasing the order for manufacturing
Description: An order defines the material you need to produce, the plant location for production, the date and time of production, and the quantity of goods required. It also specifies which components and sequence of operations are used and how the order costs are settled. You can call this API to perform order-related actions, like retrieving the order list.
